body:value: The Flexible power take-off (PTO) shaft designed and developed by CVRDE, transmits the drive between engine gearbox and Accessory gearbox of Light Combat Aircraft (LCA) - Tejas. the name "flexible PTO Shaft"is derived from the fact that the shaft is able to accommodate large misalignment, which is generally prohibited in the drive line of any transmission system. Since the PTO shaft connects Engine mounted gearbox and Aircraft mounted gearbox, the structural flexure of the fuselage due to the aircraft dynamics and thermal growth of the gas turbine engine operating 1700 degree C to 2000 degree C have to be accommodated by the PTO shaft during flight conditions.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: DRDO Product
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Defence
Department of Defence Research and Development
Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO)
field_sector:name: Defence
title: Power Take-off Shaft for LIGHT COMBAT AIRCRAFT-TEJAS

body:value: The data refers to the pregnant women following advices regarding services/activities about child care discussed during NHE. It is observed that the best performing states have been Andhra Pradesh, Kerala and Himachal Pradesh specifically on factors such taking care and monitoring of child's growth, immunization, breast feeding, colostrum feeding, treatment of diarrhoea, education of child, Cleanliness and hygiene.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Health
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog

Health
title: Pregnant Women Following Advices Regarding Services/Activities about Child Care Discussed During NHE

body:value: The data refers to the Pregnant Women Following Advices Regarding Services/Activities about Mother Care Discussed During NHE (%). It is observed that the best performing states have been Andhra Pradesh, Kerala and Himachal Pradesh specifically on factors such as immunization during pregnancy, institutional delivery, feeding practices during pregnancy, correct posture during pregnancy, self-care, nipple hygiene, family planning, cleanliness and hygiene.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Health
field_ministry_department:name: NITI Aayog

Health
title: Pregnant Women Following Advices Regarding Services/Activities about Mother Care Discussed During NHE (%)

body:value: The data refers to State/UT-wise and inmate wise population of prison inmates at the end of the reference year. The prison inmates are categorised into male and female. The age of inmates are grouped into 16-18 yrs, 18-30 yrs, 30-50 yrs and 50 & above yrs. The dataset contained information on Indian and foreign prisoners lodged in various jails during each of the reference year. The inmate population is classified as convicted, under trials, detenues and other prisoners.

field_group_name:name: Prison Statistics

Police
Statistics

body:value: The Private Final Consumption Expenditure (PFCE) is defined as the expenditure incurred on final consumption of goods and services by the resident households and non-profit institutions serving households (NPISH). The estimates of Private Final Consumption Expenditure (PFCE) comiled by following the commodity flow approach. It implies working of commodity balances relating to various items of consumption, taking into account (i) production; (ii) intermediate consumption in agriculture, manufacturing and other industries; (iii) net imports; (iv)change in stock; (v) consumption on government account and (vi) Gross Fixed Capital Formation (GFCF). For obtaining PFCE, the expenditure incurred by industries as intermediate consumption and all final consumption (including imports and exports) other than those by households and non-profit institutions are deducted from the total availability. An amount is also discounted for the wastage of agricultural produce. Data contains private final consumption expenditure in domestic market at constant prices.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Macro Economic Aggregates and Population
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation
field_sector:name: Economy
Macro Economy
Finance
Economy
Statistics
title: Final Consumption Expenditure at Constant Prices
